description.value:
Your Sealed beasts' size can become your own. While gaining the benefits of your Twisted Chakra Cloak, Stage 2, as a Bonus Action, you can spend 5 Twisted Chakra, temporarily increasing your size by one category. You can do this an additional time for each Twisted Chakra Cloak Stage you are in beyond the 2nd. If you are in Twisted Chakra Cloak, Stage 5, your size doesn't increase, however, you can count as having increased by up to 4 categories for the purposes of this Art. For every 5 Twisted Chakra spent you increase your size by 1 category and greatly boost your strength and durability. (Medium>Large> Huge>Gargantuan)

If there isn't enough room for you to increase your size, this ability fails but you do not spend the Twisted Chakra. This benefit last for the duration of your Twisted Chakra cloak, or until you dismiss your growth in size as a bonus action. For the duration, when you make a Strength Check or Saving throw, you add 1d10 per size category increase to the check. Also, while under the effects of this Art, reduce all damage you take by 3 times the Twisted Chakra Cloak Stage you are in. However, you cannot gain the benefits of damage reduction from your armor by any means as you completely outgrow it.
